methodsAttempted.query: opencli google search 'site:berkeley.edu generative AI policy'

methodsAttempted.notes: DuckDuckGo browser search via OpenCLI. Found 5 official berkeley.edu results.

methodsAttempted.query: Direct URL probing of berkeley.edu subdomains
methodsAttempted.notes: Probed teaching.berkeley.edu, oercs.berkeley.edu, ai.berkeley.edu, academic-senate.berkeley.edu, re-ai.berkeley.edu. Found 5 accessible AI-related URLs.

methodsAttempted.query: Probing known AI policy path patterns
methodsAttempted.notes: Found 2 PDF documents on academic-senate and re-ai subdomains.

summary: Found 5 candidates for UC Berkeley: 2 verified PDFs (Academic Senate generative AI guidance for instructors 2025, Responsible Use of Generative AI 2025), 3 verified Drupal pages needing JS rendering (OERCS AI page, OERCS Generative AI Tools page, Berkeley AI Hub guidance). 7 rejected URLs (stale 404s, inaccessible domains, login-required, research showcase redirect). OpenCLI Google search was blocked; used DuckDuckGo browser search as fallback.
